nodes.label: AI as time-saving collaborative tool
nodes.grounding_span: I like how much time AI saves me in typing and brainstorming ideas, but I know it makes mistakes

nodes.label: AI draft quality and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: The draft incorrectly stated the meeting would be 9AM EST and 4PM their time

nodes.label: AI-generated text authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: It comes off as unprofessional and a little tacky

nodes.label: AI as skill development partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch leading to dependency
nodes.grounding_span: AI is currently helping me grow my communication and negotiation skills

nodes.label: AI for research and analysis
nodes.label_negative: AI for legal and contractual matters
nodes.grounding_span: I was assessing market values for creative collaborations two weeks ago

nodes.label: Professional competence and client relationship
nodes.grounding_span: it could cause confusion and strain relationships with clients

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and voice
nodes.grounding_span: I always make sure to take any draft and make it my own

nodes.label: Skill growth and independence
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to change to be less dependent in those areas and learn new ways to interact

nodes.label: Effective advocacy and fair compensation
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to gain bargaining value and negotiation ideas from my research

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as research and analysis tool
nodes.grounding_span: I was very satisfied in how information was prepared

nodes.label: Distrust of AI accuracy due to mistakes
nodes.grounding_span: I don't fully trust them to not make mistakes

nodes.label: Rejection of unedited AI-generated text
nodes.grounding_span: It comes off as unprofessional and a little tacky

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to use more advanced techniques and ask more in-depth questions to grow even further

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative editing — refines drafts through back-and-forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will either collaborate with the model to make edits such as making the draft more succinct, or I will take what it has given me and make my own edits

nodes.label: Context-sensitive tailoring — adapts AI use based on client and situation
nodes.grounding_span: The biggest thing is preference and who the client is
